If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or your personal data, contact us at support@trustcare.app.
If you are in the EEA/UK, you may also contact your local data protection authority.
Our web surfaces may use cookies and local storage to keep sessions secure and improve performance.
You can control cookie preferences in your browser settings, though disabling them may affect functionality.
Analytics cookies are used in aggregate form to understand usage trends and improve the service.
We collect account data such as email, name, profile preferences, and authentication metadata.
When you submit reviews, we collect ratings, comments, optional media, and optional verification artifacts.
We may process device and usage data including app events, approximate location, and diagnostics.
We do not intentionally collect sensitive health records beyond the information you choose to submit.
We share data with service providers that operate hosting, analytics, moderation, and communication systems.
We may disclose information when required by law, regulation, legal process, or to protect users and platform integrity.
We do not sell personal data to third parties.
We use personal data to provide core app functionality, personalize content, and maintain account security.
We use submitted reviews and metadata for trust, safety, moderation, fraud prevention, and quality assurance.
We may use aggregated and de-identified analytics to improve product experience and reliability.
Depending on your region, you may have rights to access, correct, export, restrict, or delete your personal data.
You can update profile information directly in the app or request support for account-level actions.
You may object to certain processing where applicable under local law.
To exercise your rights, contact support@trustcare.app and we will respond within the legally required timeframe.
We apply technical and organizational safeguards designed to protect data against unauthorized access and misuse.
No online system is completely secure; we continuously monitor and improve our controls.
If a security incident affects your data, we will notify you and regulators when legally required.
